reviews.comment:
No se si esto lo lee alguna autoridad responsable . Ayer lunes x la tarde tuvimos que esperar muchísimo mientras le cargaban combustible a 2 motos ninguna llevaba casco y una de ella con 2 menores que sin duda eran conocidos de la persona que despachaba; cua do le consulte x la responsabilidad de su actitud mee respondió que nadie se lo había observado....estará espeta do qué vaya el gobernador a decirle que esta prohibido.
Evidentemente las reglas no están para ser cumplidas en este país.

(Translated by Google)
I don't know if any responsible authority reads this. Yesterday afternoon, we had to wait a very long time while two motorcycles were being refueled. Neither of them was wearing a helmet, and one of them had two minors on it who were undoubtedly acquaintances of the person at the pump. When I asked him about his behavior, he replied that no one had noticed... Is he waiting for the governor to come and tell him it's prohibited?
Clearly, the rules aren't meant to be followed in this country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210VmRGUnBUMFF6YUY4MWVEUTNMWGM0V0Vad1VHYxAB

reviews.comment:
La atención del personal Excelente!!! Ahora, las instalaciones, la higiene, la limpieza... horrible! No se si fue x algún motivo en particular pero desastroso. Deben invertir más y mejor ya que la ubicación es privilegiada. Full 5, playa 6, sanitarios 4, limpieza 0, higiene 0, atención 10, precios 5.

(Translated by Google)
The staff's attention was excellent!!! However, the facilities, hygiene, and cleanliness... horrible! I don't know if it was for a particular reason, but it was disastrous. They need to invest more and better since the location is prime. Overall 5, beach 6, restrooms 4, cleanliness 0, hygiene 0, service 10, prices 5.

reviews.comment:
Viernes 5 de diciembre. Tipo 9:30.
Nos atendieron mal a mi familia y a mí.
Tuvimos que irnos , un masculino y un femenino, si esto lo ve alguna autoridad. Por favor tome medidas , son unos inrespetuosos

(Translated by Google)
Friday, December 5th. Around 9:30 AM.
My family and I received poor service. We had to leave—a man and a woman. If any authority sees this, please take action. They are disrespectful.
